texto: A beam of light takes about two million years to reach from us to the Andromeda nebula. But my thought covers this distance in a few seconds. Perhaps some day some intermediate form of body and mind may permit us to say that we actually can travel faster than light.
explicacao: Citação de Ragnar Frisch sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “A beam of light takes about two million years to reach from us to the Andromeda nebula. But my th…” articula reflexao, day, light em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e light.
